name: Cortex Memory
description: 4-tier persistent memory (Working → Episodic → Semantic → Procedural) with Bayesian beliefs and people graph. Local-first, Rust-native.

binaryPath.description: Path to cortex-mcp-server binary (auto-detected if on PATH)

autoCapture.description: Store conversation context after each turn

autoRecall.description: Inject relevant memories before each turn

topK.description: Max memories to retrieve per recall
